title: Get notified when item doesn't received an update for a while

posts.author: TSjoerts (Thomas Sjoerts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

My team is currently working with one board that lists all our ongoing projects. Everyone adds updates using the Conversation/Update feature regarding what’s going on in that project.
However, I have been wondering if it possible to receive a notification when a project doesn’t receive such an update for more than two weeks. I have been looking at the automations, but I can’t seem to find anything like this in the default options.

Any help would be greatly appreciated

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TSjoerts - and welcome to the community! One way to make this work would be to create a new Date column that is set to two weeks in the future when an update is created. Then, have a reminder on that date column to notify someone/team when that date arrives. You can use the following custom automations:

Set the Last Comment Column to Today + 14days when an update is made:

image1323×83 6.77 KB

When the Last Comment date arrives notify someone.

image700×78 4.41 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: TSjoerts (Thomas Sjoerts)
posts.cookedHtml: This solution will work for us! Thanks so much
